# 2026-04-07

Busy day. Started with the standup — two blockers flagged. Jenkins pipeline is
still red from the weekend deploy. Need to follow up with DevOps.

- 09:00 standup. Team morale seems low after the sprint review.
- Asked Peter about the CI fix. He said he'd look at it after lunch. Still waiting.
- Call with the contractor about the garden fence. No answer — left a voicemail.
- She mentioned the holiday booking needs confirming by Friday.
- Reminder: dentist Thursday 14:30.
- Long thread on Slack about API versioning. Decision: keep v1 for 3 more months.
- School called — permission slip unsigned. Fixed via email.
- Reviewed the Q2 OKRs draft. Pushed back on the revenue target — too aggressive.
- 15:00 one-on-one with Sarah. She's frustrated about the deploy process. Valid concern.
- Dog walked at 16:30. Shorter than usual — rain.
- Grocery delivery arrived. Missing the oat milk again.
- Read an article about sleep architecture in mammals. Interesting parallels.
- Evening: tried to fix the garden light. Gave up after 20 minutes.
- Kids bedtime routine took longer than expected. Story time ran over.
- Quick message to Peter: "Any progress on the CI pipeline?" No reply yet.
